title: leucaena retusa
intro: Leucaena retusa, also known as the 'coyolote', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Leucaena retusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
